## Example scene submission

**Scene name:**  
**File:** `examples/your-file-name.json`

### What does this demonstrate?
<!-- One sentence. E.g.: "A card flip using scaleX ping-pong with an opacity crossfade at the midpoint." -->

### Who is it for?
<!-- beginner / intermediate / advanced — and what context would someone use this in? -->

### Checklist
- [ ] Canvas is 800 × 500 (or justified deviation noted above)
- [ ] All objects have descriptive names (no "rect-1", "circle-2")
- [ ] `audioTracks` is `[]`
- [ ] Playback tested from `t=0` to end with no visual glitches
- [ ] JSON validated (no parse errors)
- [ ] PR title follows the pattern: `example: My Scene Name`
